case_title: PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY VS GUINDRY LOUIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $296.42 FILED BY PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GUINDRY LOUIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-27-1990 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC GAS AND ELECTRIC COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUINDRY LOUIS $296.42 PRINCIPAL, $37.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $333.92 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUINDRY LOUIS
JANE DOE A COMPETENT MEMBER OF THE HSEHOLD OVER 18
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GUINDRY LOUIS
